title: Playgirls of Frankfurt
original_title: In Frankfurt sind die Nächte heiss
overview: After the brutal murder of the prostitute Vera Paterny, Inspector Reinisch hardly makes any progress with the investigation. Vera's colleague Sonja reports on wild sex parties of the murdered and mentions names, prominent names.
